codeReview.summary: The feature adds stronger seeded-bootstrap assertions, but it does not deliver the promised end-to-end zero-live completed-boot coverage across `/coins/markets` and `/coins/{id}`. The only zero-live test in `tests/app.test.ts` still exercises `/simple/price`, `/simple/token_price`, and `/diagnostics/runtime`, so the scrutiny gap for the other scoped trust-slice surfaces remains open.

issues.description: The zero-live completed-boot scenario never calls `/coins/markets` or `/coins/{id}` even though the feature description and VAL-CROSS-008 require explicit paired evidence across `/simple/price`, `/coins/markets`, `/coins/{id}`, and `/diagnostics/runtime`. As implemented, the test only covers `/simple/price`, `/simple/token_price`, and diagnostics, so it cannot catch cross-surface drift for markets/detail under zero-live completed boot.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, validation contract, and commit `2433e02`. Seeded-bootstrap coverage is tightened successfully, but the feature still fails its stated goal because zero-live completed-boot is not exercised end-to-end across `/coins/markets` and `/coins/{id}`.
